cards.summary: Generic arithmetic operators for number domains.
Big integer scalar values and promotion.
Boolean numeric domain and promotion behavior.
CAS expression evaluation in numeric environments.
Shared number-domain shapes and helper descriptors.
I64 scalar values and checked arithmetic.
Numeric methods such as differentiation, integration, and ODE solving.
Stable installer for the full number stack.
Exact rational values and constructor forms.
Probability, descriptive statistics, and fairness metric helpers.
F16 and bf16 tensor descriptors with f32-widened host helpers.

non_citizen_exemptions.reason: numbers/bigint number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the bigint number lib
numbers/bool number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the bool number lib
numbers/cas number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the CAS number lib
numbers/complex number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the complex number lib
numbers/cf number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the exotic number lib
continued-fraction value can carry a live coefficient generator; reconstruct from numbers/cf descriptor data
continued-fraction coefficient list view; descriptor is the source continued-fraction value
numbers/f64 number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the f64 number lib
fixed-width number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the fixed number lib
numbers/f32 number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the float number lib
numbers/func number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the function number lib
numbers/i64 number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the i64 number lib
numbers/rational number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the rational number lib
numbers/tensor number-domain marker; reconstruct by loading the tensor number lib
numbers/tensor literal class marker; tensor values use the numbers/Tensor citizen descriptor

packages.description: Forward and reverse automatic-differentiation primitives for SIM numeric code.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-ad
packages.rustdoc_summary: Automatic differentiation primitives: forward-mode dual numbers, a reverse-mode evaluation tape, and the Scalarish numeric trait they share.

packages.description: Cross-domain arithmetic dispatch over the SIM number promotion lattice.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-arith
packages.rustdoc_summary: Cross-domain arithmetic: the math/add, math/sub, math/mul, math/div, and reduction entry points that coerce mixed-domain operands through the promotion lattice and route symbolic inputs to the CAS when it is loaded.

packages.description: Arbitrary-precision integer number domain with exact arithmetic and rational promotion.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-bigint
packages.rustdoc_summary: The numbers/bigint domain: arbitrary-precision integer literals and values, their exact arithmetic, and promotion into rational.

packages.description: Boolean number domain with literal parsing and promotion into scalar numeric domains.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-bool
packages.rustdoc_summary: The numbers/bool domain: boolean literals and values as the base of the number-promotion lattice, with edges widening into the integer and float domains.

packages.description: Computer-algebra expression domain, simplification, and value conversion for SIM numbers.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-cas
packages.rustdoc_summary: The numbers/cas domain: the core computer-algebra layer. Defines the symbolic expression tree (CasExpr), its value citizen, the conversions to and from surface Expr/Value, and the cas/var and cas/simplify functions other CAS crates build on.

packages.description: Symbolic differentiation and integration rules for SIM CAS expressions.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-cas-diff
packages.rustdoc_summary: Symbolic differentiation and integration over the numbers/cas expression tree: the diff and integrate-sym functions plus an extensible registry of per-operator differentiation rules.

packages.description: Evaluation support for SIM CAS expressions against runtime values and environments.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-cas-eval
packages.rustdoc_summary: Evaluation of numbers/cas symbolic expressions: the eval-cas function that walks a CasExpr against an environment, in either numeric or symbolic mode, and the surface Expr/CasExpr bridge it uses.

packages.description: Numeric plugin descriptor helpers for advertising SIM number methods and codecs.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-codec
packages.rustdoc_summary: The number-literal codec surface: helpers that build the numeric-plugin-v1 descriptor symbols and table values advertising a numeric codec or method provider to the runtime.

packages.description: Complex number domain with arithmetic and scalar promotion edges.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-complex
packages.rustdoc_summary: The numbers/complex domain: complex literals and values, their arithmetic, and the promotion edges from i64, f64, and rational into the complex sink of the scalar lattice.

packages.description: Shared scalar-domain substrate: number-value shapes, literal classes, op installers, and promotion metadata.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-core
packages.rustdoc_summary: Shared substrate for scalar number domains: the number-value shape and browse table (value_shape), the shared number-literal shape and class (literal), and the scalar-domain spec, literal matcher, and op-loop installer (scalar). The canonical number-domain symbol registry and promotion-lattice documentation live in domains.

packages.description: Continued-fraction and exact-real helpers for the SIM number stack.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-exotic
packages.rustdoc_summary: Exotic number domains, currently the lazy continued-fraction domain (numbers/cf): infinite-precision reals carried as continued-fraction coefficient streams, their builtin constants, and the as-f64 truncation function.

packages.description: Double-precision float number domain with arithmetic and complex promotion.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-f64
packages.rustdoc_summary: Double-precision float number domain with arithmetic and complex promotion.

packages.description: Fixed-width signed and unsigned integer number domains from 8 to 128 bits.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-fixed
packages.rustdoc_summary: The fixed-width integer domains (numbers/i8 .. numbers/i128, numbers/u8 .. numbers/u128): their literals, values, and the widening promotion edges through the signed and unsigned integer lattice.

packages.description: Single-precision float number domain and promotion into f64.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-float
packages.rustdoc_summary: The numbers/f32 domain: single-precision floating-point literals and values, their scalar arithmetic, and promotion into f64.

packages.description: Callable numeric function values over symbolic or native bodies.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-func
packages.rustdoc_summary: Function number domain: callable function values built over CAS or native bodies, with fn, call, and grad operations for the Func domain.

packages.description: Signed 64-bit integer number domain with arithmetic and promotion edges.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-i64
packages.rustdoc_summary: The numbers/i64 domain: 64-bit signed-integer literals and values, their scalar arithmetic, and promotion edges into f64 and rational.

packages.description: Numeric differentiation, quadrature, and ODE dispatch over pluggable SIM number backends.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-numeric
packages.rustdoc_summary: Numeric evaluation surface: the numeric domain exposes numeric-diff, integrate, ode-solve, and composed pipelines over a registry of pluggable differentiator, quadrature, and ODE-solver backends.

packages.description: One-call installer for the standard SIM number domains and tensor backends.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-prelude
packages.rustdoc_summary: Umbrella library for the sim-numbers family: NumbersPreludeLib installs the standard number domains and tensor backends (arithmetic, f64/i64/bigint, rational, complex, CAS, func, tensor and its specializations, numeric, quad, and rk) into a runtime in one call.

packages.description: Quadrature and finite-difference plugins for the SIM numeric surface.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-quad
packages.rustdoc_summary: Quadrature and finite-difference backends for the numeric domain: fixed and adaptive integration rules plus finite-difference differentiators, packaged as a registered numeric plugin library.

packages.description: Exact rational number domain over arbitrary-precision integer numerators and denominators.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-rational
packages.rustdoc_summary: The numbers/rational domain: exact rational literals and values built over bigint numerator/denominator pairs, their reduced arithmetic, and promotion edges to and from the integer and f64 domains.

packages.description: Runge-Kutta ODE solver plugins for the SIM numeric surface.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-rk
packages.rustdoc_summary: Runge-Kutta ODE integrators for the numeric domain: fixed-step and adaptive solver backends registered as numeric ode-solve plugins.

packages.description: Statistical and probability helpers for the SIM number stack.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-stats
packages.rustdoc_summary: Probability, descriptive statistics, and fairness metric helpers for f64 number-domain data.

packages.description: Uniform n-dimensional tensor value, constructors, and specialization hooks for SIM numbers.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-tensor
packages.rustdoc_summary: The n-dimensional tensor number domain: the uniform Tensor value, its domain registration and constructors (tensor, vec, mat, ...), and the SpecTensor interface that specialized element-type backends plug into. Tensor shape and dtype stay canonical while the open TensorStorage contract supplies boxed host or loadable resident storage. Observation through Tensor::cell, Tensor::cells, and Tensor::materialize is checked so encoding and projection report resident readback failures.

packages.description: NumPy-style tensor broadcasting and promoted element-wise operations for SIM tensors.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-tensor-bcast
packages.rustdoc_summary: Tensor broadcasting specialization: element-wise binary and unary tensor operations with NumPy-style shape broadcasting and promotion rules.

packages.description: Packed boolean tensor specialization with bitwise tensor operations.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-tensor-bit
packages.rustdoc_summary: Bit-tensor specialization: a packed-word boolean tensor element type and its SpecTensor backend, with bitwise operations over the tensor domain.

packages.description: Complex f64-pair tensor specialization for SIM tensor values.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-tensor-cmplxf
packages.rustdoc_summary: Complex-float tensor specialization: a (real, imag) f64-pair tensor element type and its SpecTensor backend for the complex tensor domain.

packages.description: Contiguous f32 tensor specialization with native element-wise math.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-tensor-f32
packages.rustdoc_summary: f32 tensor specialization: a contiguous f32 tensor element type and its SpecTensor backend for the f32 tensor domain.

packages.description: Contiguous f64 tensor specialization with native element-wise math.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-tensor-f64
packages.rustdoc_summary: f64 tensor specialization: a contiguous f64 tensor element type and its SpecTensor backend for the f64 tensor domain.

packages.description: Contiguous f16 and bf16 tensor specializations with f32-widened CPU math.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-tensor-half
packages.rustdoc_summary: Half-precision tensor specialization: contiguous f16 and bf16 element types with CPU arithmetic widened to f32.

packages.description: Contiguous i64 tensor specialization with overflow-aware arithmetic.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-tensor-i64
packages.rustdoc_summary: i64 tensor specialization: a contiguous i64 tensor element type and its SpecTensor backend, with overflow-checked operations that fall back to the bigint domain.

packages.description: Linear algebra operations for SIM tensors: dot, matrix multiply, inversion, norms, and constructors.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-tensor-linalg
packages.rustdoc_summary: Reductions, linear-algebra operations, f32/f64 transcendentals, and constructors over the tensor domain, registered as a tensor library.

packages.description: Rational i64-pair tensor specialization for the SIM tensor domain.
packages.name: sim-lib-numbers-tensor-rat64
packages.rustdoc_summary: Rational-i64 tensor specialization: a normalized (numerator, denominator) i64-pair tensor element type and its SpecTensor backend for the rational tensor domain.

packages.description: Repository automation wrapper for sim-numbers generated documentation and policy checks.
packages.name: xtask
packages.rustdoc_summary: Repository automation wrapper for sim-numbers generated documentation and policy checks.
